pass1_value.note: Help doc states 'You can find your API token in your Fathom dashboard under Settings → Integrations', implying developers can obtain tokens from their dashboard without manual approval. No docs were found stating API access requires paid plan or sales contact.

final_value.note: Help article says you can find your API token in the Fathom dashboard under Settings → Integrations, indicating self-serve token access (no sales/support approval mentioned).

pass1_value.note: Public docs plus self-serve API token available in dashboard -> developer can obtain credentials and call REST endpoints immediately. Rate limit increases require contacting support but do not block initial development.

final_value.note: The help article states the API token is available in the dashboard (Settings → Integrations) and the API reference shows how to authenticate with `Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_TOKEN>` and provides concrete REST endpoints, enabling immediate development with self-serve credentials.
